prediction_outcome: Scenario B confirmed (K < V universal, cross-model difference in finer metrics)
key_finding: K cache has lower effective rank than V on BOTH models (K/V=0.87-0.94). K top-1 energy is 3.5-4.1x higher than V — K routing dominated by one principal direction. Novel layer-dependent crossover: early layers K>V rank, late layers K<V rank. Cross-model K rank difference only 2.4% — effective rank doesn't capture digital/analog, but spectral gap (Qwen 4.32>Llama 3.66) and top-1 energy (Qwen 0.615>Llama 0.576) DO. Qwen K has 3x higher layer variability (std=40 vs 13). First independent geometric evidence for K>V hierarchy.
evidence_impact: Strong — provides independent non-perturbation geometric confirmation of K>V hierarchy. Adds 7th angle of K>V confirmation. Identifies layer-dependent crossover as novel structural finding.
next_planned: Per-head spectral analysis (are answer heads H0/H5 spectrally distinct?); pre-RoPE vs post-RoPE K cache; statistical tests for K<V

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION decisive on Qwen, weak on Llama.

positional_dissociation.status: Complete. Head x position interaction is encoding-dependent.

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL: 7 angles. NEW: K effective rank < V (0.87-0.94), K top-1 energy 3.5-4.1x > V, spectral gap 2.2-2.8x > V. Layer-dependent crossover discovered.

head_level_analysis.status: COMPLETE: Two-regime on Qwen (decisive), near-collapse on Llama. Independently confirmed by RLKV and KVP.

natural_usage.status: DECISIVE for post-hoc: 'Recent' 134/134 pooled [97.3%, 100%]. CAVEAT: may not generalize to real-time decoding.

encoding_strategy.status: COMPLETE TAXONOMY + geometric evidence: K top-1 energy Qwen>Llama (0.615>0.576), spectral gap Qwen>Llama (4.32>3.66), K variability Qwen>>Llama (std 40 vs 13). Effective rank alone insufficient for digital/analog.

literature_convergence.status: DECISIVE: 6 scans, 65+ papers, 7-angle K>V confirmation (now including spectral geometry).
